name: Indian Institute of Technology Madras
description: Consistently ranked #1 in NIRF for engineering, IIT Madras is renowned for its research output, sprawling green campus, and incubation ecosystem.

name: Vellore Institute of Technology
description: A premier private engineering institution known for its state-of-the-art infrastructure and excellent placement records.

name: Indian Institute of Technology Bombay
description: A global leader in engineering education and research, situated in the financial capital of India.

name: College of Engineering Pune
description: One of the oldest engineering colleges in Asia, known for its rich legacy and strong alumni network.

name: Indian Institute of Science Bangalore
description: India's premier institute for advanced scientific and technological research.

name: National Institute of Technology Karnataka
description: A top-tier NIT with a private beach, renowned for high academic standards and placements.

name: Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad
description: The undisputed leader in management education in India, boasting global standards.

name: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology
description: An institute of national importance located in the diamond city of India.

name: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur
description: Known for its rigorous academics and massive campus, IITK is a global hub for engineering and science.

name: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow
description: Recognized globally for its management programs and beautifully landscaped campus.

name: Indian Institute of Technology Kharagpur
description: The oldest IIT with the largest campus in India, fostering multidisciplinary learning.

name: Jadavpur University
description: Highly respected state university known for an incredible return on investment and strong technical departments.

name: Birla Institute of Technology and Science
description: One of India's best private engineering colleges, famous for its no-attendance policy and entrepreneurial culture.

name: Malaviya National Institute of Technology
description: Leading NIT in the western region, known for strong architectural and engineering disciplines.

name: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad
description: One of the fastest-growing second-generation IITs, celebrated for its unique fractional credit system and fractal academics.

name: National Institute of Technology Warangal
description: The first in the chain of NITs, renowned for phenomenal engineering placements and rigorous curriculum.

name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology
description: One of India's oldest and most prestigious private deemed-to-be-universities with strong industry tie-ups.

name: Dr. B R Ambedkar National Institute of Technology
description: Known for core engineering streams and robust campus facilities.

name: National Institute of Technology Calicut
description: An institute of national importance characterized by high academic rigor and lush green surroundings.

name: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode
description: Situated on two hillocks, this IIM is renowned for its diverse cohorts and stellar global placements.

name: Indian Institute of Technology Tirupati
description: One of the fast-growing third-generation IITs offering state-of-the-art facilities and a growing research culture.

name: Koneru Lakshmaiah Education Foundation
description: A highly-rated deemed university known for strict academics, extensive infrastructure, and strong volume placements.

name: Indian Institute of Technology Patna
description: A second-generation IIT that has rapidly scaled its research output and tech placements in Eastern India.

name: National Institute of Technology Patna
description: One of the oldest engineering institutes in India, located along the banks of the river Ganges.

name: Indian Institute of Technology Indore
description: A prominent second-generation IIT that leads in academic citations and cutting-edge engineering research.

name: Indian Institute of Management Indore
description: The 'Planet-I' campus is renowned for its IPM program and robust industry integration in management education.

name: National Institute of Technology Rourkela
description: Boasting one of the largest engineering campuses in India, NIT Rourkela excels in both core and software engineering.

name: Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology
description: A leading private university in Eastern India with world-class facilities and diverse academic programs.

name: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati
description: Considered the most beautiful IIT campus, situated on the banks of the Brahmaputra with outstanding tech placements.

name: National Institute of Technology Silchar
description: An institute of national importance characterized by large water bodies on campus and robust software placements.

name: National Institute of Technology Kurukshetra
description: One of the premier NITs in Northern India, recognized for strong core engineering streams and excellent placement metrics.

name: Ashoka University
description: India's premier liberal arts and sciences university, distinguished by its elite faculty and interdisciplinary curriculum.

name: National Institute of Technology Raipur
description: A prominent engineering hub in central India famous for mining, metallurgical, and software engineering placements.

name: Indian Institute of Management Raipur
description: Among the fastest-rising newer IIMs with a state-of-the-art campus in Naya Raipur and excellent ROI.

name: Indian Institute of Technology (ISM) Dhanbad
description: Formerly the Indian School of Mines, this prestigious IIT is a global powerhouse for earth sciences and engineering.

name: Xavier School of Management Jamshedpur
description: India's oldest business school and arguably the best institution for Human Resources in the Asia-Pacific.

name: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee
description: Asia's oldest technical institution, IIT Roorkee provides a historic campus combined with cutting-edge engineering output.

name: University of Petroleum and Energy Studies
description: A multi-disciplinary private university set in the scenic foothills of the Himalayas, noted for domain-specific placements.

name: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi
description: Located in the serene Himalayan foothills, IIT Mandi offers a highly innovative curriculum focused on applied sciences.

name: National Institute of Technology Hamirpur
description: Often cited as one of the most picturesque NIT campuses, it has steady placements across IT and core sectors.

name: National Institute of Technology Goa
description: An institute of national importance located in the vibrant state of Goa, known for strong computer science and electronics programs.

name: Goa Institute of Management
description: One of the premier private B-schools in India, renowned for its scenic campus and rigorous PGDM programs.

name: National Institute of Technology Arunachal Pradesh
description: A rising technical institution in the northeastern hills, rapidly expanding its research output and infrastructure.

name: Rajiv Gandhi University
description: The premier central university in Arunachal Pradesh offering diverse programs in arts, sciences, and commerce.

name: National Institute of Technology Manipur
description: A growing institute of national importance providing top-tier technical education in the Imphal valley.

name: Manipur University

name: Indian Institute of Management Shillong
description: Known as the 'Campus in the Clouds', IIM Shillong is celebrated for its focus on sustainability and robust corporate placements.

name: National Institute of Technology Meghalaya
description: Among the top-performing newer NITs, situated in the scenic hills with excellent per-capita academic output.

name: National Institute of Technology Mizoram
description: A premier technical institution in the northeast focused on bringing quality engineering education to the region.

name: Mizoram University
description: A prominent central university recognized for its massive eco-friendly campus and comprehensive science departments.

name: National Institute of Technology Nagaland
description: Fostering engineering talent in Nagaland with steady infrastructure development and dedicated faculties.

name: Nagaland University
description: A central university providing a wide array of programs in arts, sciences, and agricultural studies.

name: National Institute of Technology Sikkim
description: Operating from a temporary campus in scenic Ravangla, NIT Sikkim excels in software placements despite its remote location.

name: Sikkim Manipal Institute of Technology
description: A constituent college of Sikkim Manipal University, SMIT is recognized for its top-notch labs and high employability rates.

name: National Institute of Technology Agartala
description: Formerly Tripura Engineering College, NIT Agartala boasts a massive campus and strong placement statistics in core and IT sectors.

name: Tripura University
description: The main public central university of Tripura providing diverse post-graduate programs and doctoral research.
